title: lachydotmcg/metis-orchestrator
summary: Local-first AI orchestration studio. Route every task to the best-suited model, local or cloud. BYO keys or OpenRouter, free.

title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: A memory-first AI agent that remembers why decisions were made — not just the last message. Runs local (Ollama), cloud (Claude · OpenAI · Gemini), or decentralized TEE. Graph memory, self-learning skills, multi-model routing, sandboxed tools. MCP · ACP · A2A. One Rust binary.

title: Raniafsl/CodeCoachAI
summary: AI-powered code review platform built with Flask, SQLite, and Ollama that provides automated feedback, scoring, and personalized learning suggestions.

title: open-multi-agent/open-multi-agent
summary: TypeScript AI agent orchestration framework with dynamic workflows. Describe the goal, not the graph: a coordinator plans the task DAG at runtime and runs it on any LLM (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, or local models).

title: doncazper/model-router
summary: Local AI control center and routing/control plane for OpenAI-compatible agents, local runtimes, receipts, telemetry, and safety policy.

title: pdbethke/corralai
summary: One directive → a herd of AI agents that plan, build, verify, and re-plan across any model (local 7B to frontier) — human-gated, jail→repo, with shared memory + skills. Every mission recorded and replayable.

title: codemonkeying/lean-coder
summary: Lightweight terminal coding agent (~1.2k-token baseline) - drives a small local model or a frontier model with parallel workers

title: ismael-joffroy-chandoutis/4x5090-llm-rig
summary: Building a 4x RTX 5090 open-air rig for local LLM inference — 128 GB VRAM on a prosumer budget

title: jpoindexter/Vanta
summary: A local AI agent with a Rust safety kernel that gates every action — goal-aware, provider-agnostic, self-hosted. MIT.

title: bouyantai/ballast
summary: Keeps your AI agents from going overboard. A local-first log + safety layer — records every decision, flags dangerous intents, keeps a tamper-evident trail. No cloud, runs anywhere.

title: yuma-shintani/ollama-model-library
summary: Get Ollama models from the Ollama library website (https://ollama.com/library) in JSON format.

title: gary23w/nl-veil
summary: A swarm of autonomous AI minds, unified and steered by a single consciousness - the Veil. Runs on any language model.

title: M2253510/QResponder
summary: Automate vendor security questionnaire responses using your private knowledge base with this local-first, self-hosted tool.

title: bethinamacrocephalic696/AI-Text-Processing-Assistant
summary: Automate text analysis and structured data extraction using local LLMs, custom prompt engineering, and production workflows.

title: grandelagbanou28-gif/GradenIA
summary: Graden IA - Interface IA intelligente avec Ollama, Gemini et modèles locaux

title: vardhjain/graphrag-pubmedqa-ablation
summary: GraphRAG vs PlainRAG ablation on PubMedQA. Parent expansion wins +22.5pp (McNemar p<0.0001). Leakage-free, 4-arm design.

title: ManifoldKit/ManifoldKit
summary: Reusable SwiftUI chat framework for local and cloud LLM inference on Apple platforms

title: dryvist/nix-ai
summary: Your AI coding toolkit, declared in Nix — Claude, Gemini, Copilot, 15+ MCP servers, one flake
